title: ASR Outdoor 19L Griptape Backpack Dual Zip Two Tone Navy OD Green Travel Bag
description:
Travel in style with the ASR Outdoor Griptape Two Tone Backpack! This trendy backpack is constructed of durable 600D water-resistant polyester, so you can count on it to protect your belongings during travel. It measures 17" x 12" x 6.5", making it a great day pack or weekender backpack that will hold your essentials like a laptop, change of clothes or notebooks. The backpack features dual zippered front pockets and padded adjustable shoulder straps for custom comfort, and the dual hook and loop front straps can even hold a skateboard in place. It has a carrying capacity of up to 19 liters (1,192 cubic inches) and comes in a cool navy blue and green dual color that fits with most fashion styles. This is a great backpack for students, campers, hikers and travel enthusiasts
